title: 🛡️ Windows Defender Firewall
description: From basics to WFP deep dive. Learn firewall profiles, rules, GPO, and advanced diagnostics.

title: 🔗 Windows Failover Clustering
description: Quorum, CSV, node eviction, stretch clusters. Master cluster troubleshooting.

title: 💾 Windows Storage Fundamentals
description: Disk performance, iSCSI, MPIO, Storport, partition/volume management, volume corruption, disk errors, and storage advisory.

title: 📁 NTFS & ReFS Filesystems
description: Filesystem internals, NTFS vs ReFS comparison, USB block policies, corruption recovery, and filesystem troubleshooting.

title: 📊 Cluster Shared Volumes (CSV)
description: CSV architecture, direct I/O vs redirected I/O, CSV cache, troubleshooting CSV issues in failover clusters.

title: 🏗️ Storage Spaces & S2D
description: Storage Spaces fundamentals, Storage Spaces Direct (S2D), pool management, resiliency types, and troubleshooting.

title: ♻️ Deduplication & FSRM
description: Data Deduplication optimization, File Server Resource Manager quotas/screens, and storage efficiency management.

title: 🔄 Hyper-V Live Migration
description: Master Live Migration fundamentals, troubleshooting migration failures, and performance optimization across hosts.

title: 🔒 Hyper-V Shielded VMs
description: Understand Host Guardian Service, attestation modes, and how to protect VMs from compromised fabric admins.

title: 💻 Virtualization & Hyper-V
description: Core Hyper-V architecture, VM management, virtual networking, and storage fundamentals for support engineers.
